name: Macro Output
description: Defines an output port for a macro. Place this node in a workflow to expose it as an output when the workflow is used as a macro.
doc:
Define an output value for a macro workflow.

Usage:
1. Add to a macro workflow
2. Set the output name and type
3. Connect the result you want to expose
4. The output appears as a handle on the Macro node

Properties:
• Name - label shown on the macro node
• Type - declares the output data type

Multiple Outputs:
Add multiple Macro Output nodes to expose several results from a single macro.

inputs.name: Value
inputs.description: The value to output from this macro port

properties.name: Output Name
properties.description: Name of this output (shown on macro node handle)
